kill_clip.name: Kill Clip
kill_clip.description: Reloading after a kill grants +25% damage for a brief window.

frenzy.name: Frenzy
frenzy.description: After 12 seconds in continuous combat, +15% damage (also improves handling and reload).

surrounded.name: Surrounded
surrounded.description: +40% damage when 3 or more enemies are nearby.

explosive_light.name: Explosive Light
explosive_light.description: Picking up an Orb of Power grants +25% damage for the next shot or short burst.

bait_and_switch.name: Bait and Switch
bait_and_switch.description: Deal damage with all three equipped weapons within a short window to activate +35% damage.

target_lock.name: Target Lock
target_lock.description: Damage increases with continuous fire, ramping up to +40% at max stacks.

rampage.name: Rampage
rampage.description: Kills grant a stacking damage bonus (PvE: 20/41/66% at ×1/×2/×3). Stacks expire one at a time every 4.5s.

golden_tricorn.name: Golden Tricorn
golden_tricorn.description: ×2 from a weapon kill of matching element (+15%). ×3 from an ability kill of matching element (+50%).

swashbuckler.name: Swashbuckler
swashbuckler.description: Melee kills or rapid weapon kills grant a stacking damage bonus up to ×5.

adrenaline_junkie.name: Adrenaline Junkie
adrenaline_junkie.description: Grenade kills or rapid weapon kills grant a stacking damage bonus up to ×5.

successful_warm_up.name: Successful Warm-Up
successful_warm_up.description: Rapid kills build stacks granting up to +33% damage on linear fusion rifles.

vorpal_weapon.name: Vorpal Weapon
vorpal_weapon.description: Increased damage vs bosses, vehicles, Supered Guardians. Primary: +20%, Special: +15%, Power: +10%.

firing_line.name: Firing Line
firing_line.description: +25% precision damage when near two or more allies aiming at the same target.

trench_barrel.name: Trench Barrel
trench_barrel.description: After a melee hit, the next 3 shots deal +50% damage with improved handling. Shotgun only.

one_two_punch.name: One-Two Punch
one_two_punch.description: Hitting an enemy with every pellet in a shot briefly grants +50% melee damage. Shotgun only.

desperado.name: Desperado
desperado.description: After a precision kill that empties the magazine, the next magazine deals +40% damage. Pulse rifles only.

high_ground.name: High Ground
high_ground.description: +10% weapon damage when shooting at targets that are below you.

killing_tally.name: Killing Tally
killing_tally.description: Kills grant stacking damage (PvE: 10/20/30% at ×1/×2/×3). Stow or reload removes all stacks. Passively grants +10 Magazine.

one_for_all.name: One For All
one_for_all.description: Hitting 3 different targets in quick succession grants +35% damage for 10.5s.

radiant.name: Radiant
radiant.description: Solar subclass buff. +10% weapon damage against all targets.

empowering_rift.name: Empowering Rift
empowering_rift.description: Warlock empowering rift. +20% weapon damage while active.

weapons_of_light.name: Weapons of Light
weapons_of_light.description: Titan Ward of Dawn. +25% weapon damage for all Guardians inside the bubble.

well_of_radiance.name: Well of Radiance
well_of_radiance.description: Warlock Well of Radiance super. +25% weapon damage while standing in the well.

banner_shield.name: Banner Shield
banner_shield.description: Titan Banner Shield super. +35% weapon damage for allies near the banner.

lumina_noble_rounds.name: Noble Rounds (Lumina)
lumina_noble_rounds.description: Lumina exotic hand cannon. Allies receiving Noble Rounds gain +35% weapon damage.

weaken.name: Weaken
weaken.description: Void debuff. Weakened enemies take +15% increased damage from all sources.

tether.name: Shadowshot Tether
tether.description: Void Hunter Shadowshot super. Tethered enemies take +30% increased damage from all sources.

divinity.name: Divinity
divinity.description: Divinity exotic trace rifle. Targets caught in the cage take +15% increased damage.

sect_of_force.name: Sect of Force
sect_of_force.description: Prismatic Transcendence benefit. Grants +25% bonus weapon damage while Transcendent.

sect_of_insight.name: Sect of Insight
sect_of_insight.description: Prismatic Transcendence benefit. Powered melee final blows generate additional Transcendence energy.

blessing_of_the_sky.name: Blessing of the Sky
blessing_of_the_sky.description: Arc subclass buff. Empowers allies with enhanced weapon performance and +10% weapon damage.

disruption_break.name: Disruption Break
disruption_break.description: Weapon perk. Breaking an enemy's elemental shield grants a +50% kinetic weapon damage bonus for a short duration.

judgment.name: Judgment
judgment.description: Stasis debuff from Silence & Squall. Enemies within the storm take +25% increased damage.

tractor_cannon_debuff.name: Tractor Cannon
tractor_cannon_debuff.description: Tractor Cannon exotic shotgun. Enemies hit are suppressed and take +30% increased Void damage.

worm_byproduct.name: Worm Byproduct
worm_byproduct.description: Wormgod's Caress exotic gauntlets. Powered melee kills stack up bonus melee damage (not weapon damage).

spark_of_frequency.name: Spark of Frequency
spark_of_frequency.description: Arc fragment. Rapid pulse/scout/auto rifle final blows create an Ionic Trace. (Utility — no direct damage bonus.)

amplified.name: Amplified
amplified.description: Arc keyword. Improves weapon handling, airborne effectiveness, and sprint speed. (Utility — no direct damage bonus.)

ember_of_tempering.name: Ember of Tempering
ember_of_tempering.description: Solar fragment. Solar weapon final blows grant Radiant to you and nearby allies. (Activate Radiant above for the damage bonus.)

sever.name: Sever
sever.description: Strand debuff. Severed enemies deal significantly less damage and take +15% increased damage from all sources.

whisper_of_hedrons.name: Whisper of Hedrons
whisper_of_hedrons.description: Stasis fragment. Freezing a target grants significantly increased weapon stability, aim assist, and a Weapon Surge.

thread_of_ascent.name: Thread of Ascent
thread_of_ascent.description: Strand fragment. Activating grenade reloads your equipped weapon and boosts airborne effectiveness and mobility. (Utility — no direct damage bonus.)

flow_state.name: Flow State
flow_state.description: Arc Hunter keyword. Improves weapon reload speed, handling, and dodge cooldown. (Utility — no direct damage bonus.)

on_your_mark.name: On Your Mark
on_your_mark.description: Arc Hunter precision final blows grant On Your Mark, boosting weapon handling and reload speed for you and nearby allies.

moebius_quiver.name: Moebius Quiver
moebius_quiver.description: Shadowshot: Moebius Quiver super. Tethered enemies take +30% increased damage from all sources.

deadfall.name: Deadfall
deadfall.description: Shadowshot: Deadfall super. Enemies in the anchor's zone of influence take +30% increased damage.

heat_rises.name: Heat Rises
heat_rises.description: Solar Warlock Dawnblade aspect. Grants Radiant and enhanced aerial weapon performance while airborne.

rally_barricade.name: Rally Barricade
rally_barricade.description: Titan class ability. Crouching behind the barricade instantly reloads your equipped weapon and boosts reload speed. (Utility — no direct damage bonus.)

sentinel_shield.name: Sentinel Shield
sentinel_shield.description: Void Titan Sentinel super. Activating Sentinel Shield grants allies a Weapons of Light buff (+35% weapon damage).
